name: evaluate-sd-github-review-consolidation
title: Evaluate sd-github-review repository consolidation
description: Keep sd-ai-command-pack and sd-github-review separate behind a staged review protocol while replacing the pack's overlapping review and full-check commands with one clean deterministic check surface and one unified review lifecycle.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Decision: keep repositories separate behind a versioned staged-review protocol and make a non-backward-compatible command-pack cutover. Public names, scope-based fix defaults, optional-local failure continuation, worktree-versus-PR publishing boundaries, and graceful optional router absence are approved. Missing optional setup degrades without prompting; explicit/required remote review stops early, while broken or ambiguous router state fails closed. Every new head requires a distinct router decision/receipt; router auto policy alone may classify a verified bookkeeping-only successor as none. The router is noninteractive and never executes PR checkout code. Local child 07-22-integrate-routed-review-backends owns the clean surface and consumes the router contract published first by platypeeps/sd-github-review task 07-22-publish-routed-review-receipt-contract.
